index_definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX legal_documents_current_published_idx ON public.legal_documents USING btree (document_type) WHERE (status = 'published'::text)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX legal_documents_document_type_version_key ON public.legal_documents USING btree (document_type, version)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX legal_documents_pkey ON public.legal_documents USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX legal_documents_type_status_idx ON public.legal_documents USING btree (document_type, status, effective_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX order_agreement_acceptances_order_id_document_type_key ON public.order_agreement_acceptances USING btree (order_id, document_type)
CREATE INDEX order_agreement_acceptances_order_idx ON public.order_agreement_acceptances USING btree (order_id, created_at)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX order_agreement_acceptances_pkey ON public.order_agreement_acceptances USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX order_agreement_acceptances_user_idx ON public.order_agreement_acceptances USING btree (user_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX order_evidence_events_order_idx ON public.order_evidence_events USING btree (order_id, created_at)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX order_evidence_events_pkey ON public.order_evidence_events USING btree (id)
